title: Tao Te Ching 5
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 5 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 5 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Heaven and earth are not humane. They treat all things as straw dogs. The sage is not humane. He treats all people as straw dogs.
